creator: kaho@elam.kais.kyoto-u.ac.jp
text:
(In reply to igor from comment #4)
Thanks for your reports. It reveals the location causing the panic,
but I'm sorry that I cannot find why the panic happens.
All resource allocations are succeeding but only MSI-X setting is failing.

A workaround I can suggest for this panic is to disable MSI-X. 
Please try to set in your /boot/loader.conf :
hw.igb.enable_msix=0
